## 1. Identity & goal

- **BGS slice**: `BGS-State-Modeled-Governed`

### Goal (hand-editable)

<!-- GOAL-BEGIN -->
_(Edit me — describe the project's goal in plain language. Everything between the GOAL-BEGIN and GOAL-END markers is preserved across regenerations.)_
<!-- GOAL-END -->

### Decision reason (from BGS.md)

> AI workstation setup depends on explicit installation, configuration, readiness, runtime, and recovery semantics across 10 components (8 software + 1 system + 1 verification, 10 active). Preflight gate (supported-platform) and UCC convergence are interpreted against an ASM-aligned setup state model with parametric state for value-convergence targets. Capability targets replace most gates for precondition checks. TIC verification provides post-convergence evidence. The repo supports macOS, Linux, and WSL2 via platform-aware package driver."

### Scope (from BGS.md)

> AI workstation setup — 10 governed components (10 active): software layer (software-bootstrap, cli-tools, node-stack, vscode-stack, docker, ai-python-stack, ai-apps, build-tools), system layer (system), verification (verify)"

## 2. Architecture

```
install.sh
  └─ UIC pre-convergence  → gates + preference resolution (lib/uic.sh)
  └─ UCC convergence      → component runners + driver dispatch (lib/ucc*.sh, lib/drivers/*.sh)
  └─ TIC verification     → post-convergence assertions (lib/tic*.sh, tic/**.yaml)
```

The driver layer is the single dispatch point for installs/upgrades/
config writes. See `docs/driver-feature-matrix.md` for the full list.

## 5. Preferences  (`defaults/preferences.yaml`)

| Name | Default | Options | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|
| `default-selection` | `all` | `all|none` | all: install/update everything when no targets specified; none: show current state only (select targets explicitly) |
| `skip-display-mode` | `full` | `full|fast` | full: show every target with current state and version (slower observe); fast: hide non-selected targets entirely (faster runs) |
| `destructive-updates` | `off` | `on|off` | off prevents destructive container/package replacement without explicit operator intent; on allows full reimaging on update |
| `service-policy` | `autostart` | `manual|autostart` | autostart: script starts required services (Docker, Ollama) when not running; manual: operator starts services before running the script |
| `update-policy` | `balanced` | `conservative|balanced|aggressive` | conservative: install only, no upstream checks; balanced: auto-upgrade tools, hold libs stable, upstream checks on; aggressive: upgrade everything including libs |
| `pip-global-policy` | `permissive` | `permissive|strict|migrate` | permissive: keep all packages in global pip; strict: warn on packages with conflicting upper-version constraints; migrate: auto-remove conflicting packages from global when they exist in a venv or are orphaned |
| `preferred-driver-policy` | `warn` | `ignore|warn|migrate` | ignore accepts software found outside the preferred install driver; warn reports drift without changing it; migrate allows supported targets to converve to the preferred driver |

## 6. Gates  (`defaults/gates.yaml`)

## 9. TIC verification catalog

23 post-convergence tests across `tic/`.

| Name | Component | Intent | Oracle |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ollama-model-loadable` | `ai-apps` | Ollama must be able to load a model for inference | `ollama_model_loadable` |
| `docker-compose-services-healthy` | `ai-apps` | Docker Compose services must report healthy status | `docker_compose_services_healthy` |
| `pytorch-mps-usable` | `ai-python-stack` | PyTorch MPS backend must be usable for GPU acceleration | `torch_mps_available` |
| `vscode-python-extension-active` | `dev-tools` | VS Code Python extension must be installed and active | `vscode_extension_installed ms-python.python` |
| `node-via-nvm` | `dev-tools` | Node.js must be managed by nvm, not Homebrew | `node_via_nvm_check` |
| `langchain-ollama-integration` | `ai-python-stack` | langchain-ollama must be importable (bridges LangChain to local Ollama) | `python3_module_importable langchain_ollama` |
| `torch-importable` | `ai-python-stack` | torch must be importable | `python3_module_importable torch` |
| `transformers-importable` | `ai-python-stack` | transformers must be importable | `python3_module_importable transformers` |
| `langchain-importable` | `ai-python-stack` | langchain must be importable | `python3_module_importable langchain` |
| `langchain-core-version` | `ai-python-stack` | langchain-core must be >=1.0.0 (required by langgraph and langchain-ollama) | `pip_package_min_version "langchain-core" "1.0.0"` |
| `unsloth-importable` | `ai-python-stack` | unsloth Python package is not importable on Apple Silicon (NVIDIA/AMD only) | `python3_module_importable unsloth` |
| `cmake-installed` | `dev-tools` | cmake must be present (required for Unsloth GGUF inference) | `is_installed cmake` |
| `open-webui-health` | `ai-apps` | Open WebUI must be accessible on port 3000 | `http_probe_localhost 3000` |
| `flowise-health` | `ai-apps` | Flowise must be accessible on port 3001 | `http_probe_localhost 3001` |
| `openhands-health` | `ai-apps` | OpenHands must be accessible on port 3002 | `http_probe_localhost 3002` |
| `n8n-health` | `ai-apps` | n8n must be accessible on port 5678 | `http_probe_localhost 5678` |
| `qdrant-health` | `ai-apps` | Qdrant must be accessible on port 6333 | `http_probe_localhost 6333` |
| `system-composition-converged` | `system` | system-composition must converge before system verification is accepted | `_tic_target_status_is "system-composition" "ok"` |
| `homebrew-installed` | `system` | Homebrew package manager must be installed | `is_installed brew` |
| `python3-available` | `system` | Python 3 must be available for AI stack | `is_installed python3` |
| `git-available` | `system` | Git must be available | `is_installed git` |
| `docker-desktop-running` | `system` | Docker Desktop must be running to execute AI apps | `docker_daemon_is_running` |
| `ollama-api-reachable` | `system` | Ollama API must be reachable for local LLM inference | `http_probe_localhost 11434` |
